title: Bougainvillea Pink Pixie Queen |Plug Plant | Climber
features: Enhance your garden's beauty, supplied as a plug plant
description: Introducing the Bougainvillea Plug Plant! Enhance your garden with the vibrant beauty of our Bougainvillea Climber Plug Plant. With its enchanting blossoms and easy-to-care-for nature, this plug plant is a must-have for any flower enthusiast. Each purchase includes a single plug plant, ready to be potted into a 9cm pot. Enjoy the flexibility of placing it in your preferred location, be it a sunny spot in your garden or a cozy corner on your patio. The Bougainvillea is renowned for its love for full sun and thrives in well-draining soil, ideal in baking heat. This robust species can withstand temperatures as low as 0°C, making it a half-hardy addition to your outdoor space. While some believe in its potential for even greater resilience, it remains untested.
